[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m3. Use gh-axi for GitHub operations and chrome-devtools-axi for browser operations.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                               [0m

[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m   `echo "{state}: {one short line}" >> '/Users/jwalinshah/firstmate/state/quota-dispatch.status'`[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m   States: working, needs-decision, blocked, done, failed.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                        [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m   Each append wakes firstmate, so report sparingly: only phase changes a supervisor[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                              [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m   would act on (setup done, bug reproduced, fix implemented, validation passed) and the[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                          [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m   needs-decision/blocked/done/failed states. No step-by-step FYI progress lines;[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                 [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m   firstmate reads your pane for that.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                            [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m5. If you hit the same obstacle twice, append `blocked: {why}` and stop; firstmate will help.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                     [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m6. If a decision belongs to a human (product choices, destructive actions, ask-user findings),[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m   append `needs-decision: {summary of options}` and stop. Firstmate will reply with the decision.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                [0m
[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                                    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m# Project memory[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                  [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mIf `AGENTS.md` or `CLAUDE.md` already exists, or if this task produced durable project-intrinsic knowledge, run `/Users/jwalinshah/firstmate/bin/fm-ensure-agents-md.sh .` in the worktree.[0m[48;5;8m                       [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mIf this task produced durable project-intrinsic knowledge, record it in `AGENTS.md` as part of your change.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                       [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mKeep it proportionate: skip `AGENTS.md` edits for trivial tasks that produced no durable project knowledge.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                       [0m
[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                                    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m# Tools[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                           [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m- Query cocoindex for related code.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                               [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m- Query `tldr calls` on changed functions to see callers and impact.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                              [0m
[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                                    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m# Definition of done[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                              [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mThe task is complete only when committed on your branch.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                          [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mWhen you believe it is complete, append `done: {summary}` to the status file and stop.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                            [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mFirstmate will then instruct you to run /no-mistakes to validate and ship a PR.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                   [0m
[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                                    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mYou drive no-mistakes by responding to its gates, not by implementing fixes.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                      [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mFollow the guidance no-mistakes itself provides for the mechanics: it loads when you invoke /no-mistakes, and `no-mistakes axi run --help` plus the `help` lines in each `axi` response are authoritative and [0m[48;5;8m    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mversion-matched to the installed binary.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                          [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mDo not hand-edit, commit, or fix findings yourself while a run is active - the pipeline applies every fix.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                        [0m
[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                                    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mTwo firstmate-specific rules layer on top of that guidance:[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                       [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m- ask-user findings are not yours to answer: escalate to firstmate (rule 6) and stop.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                             [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m  When the decision comes back, feed it to the gate with `no-mistakes axi respond` and let the pipeline apply it - do not route the question to "the user" or implement the fix yourself.[0m[48;5;8m                         [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8m- Avoid `--yes`: the captain, not you, owns the ask-user decisions it would silently auto-resolve.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                [0m
[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                                                                                                                                    [0m
[0m[48;5;8m  [0m[38;5;15m[48;5;8mAfter /no-mistakes reports CI green, append `done: PR {url} checks green` and stop. You are finished.[0m[48;5;8m                                                                                                             [0m
